name: victini
flavor_texts: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.
It creates an unlimited supply of energy inside its body, which it shares with those who touch it.
When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.
text: Victini is the Victory Pokémon. It is a psychic and fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: victory-star. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 100, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 100, Sp. Def: 100, Speed: 100. Evolution line: victini. Lore: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter. It creates an unlimited supply of energy inside its body, which it shares with those who touch it. When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.
